summary: Completed testing of weekly planning calendar feature. Backend APIs working perfectly (90% success), frontend admin access has stability issues preventing full UI testing.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns status 200 instead of 201 for POST requests
minor_bugs.impact: Minor status code inconsistency, functionality works

ui_bugs.issue: Modal appears inconsistently and login process is unstable
Admin login triggers work (Control+Alt+A, typing 'admin') but state management appears unstable

integration_issues.issue: Cannot consistently access admin dashboard after login to test planning features

passed_tests: Weekly schedule GET endpoint with date parameter
Bulk schedule creation (21 entries saved successfully)
Schedule data structure (15 working days, 6 FRI days)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend admin authentication flow - modal triggers work but login state management is unstable. Backend schedule APIs are working perfectly. Need to stabilize admin modal state and login persistence to enable full UI testing of planning features.
